response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, but his profile centers on web/full-stack work (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than the role's core requirement of deep, current C++ expertise. His only professional C++ experience was a ~7-month stint at National Instruments a decade ago, and he shows no exposure to industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practices. Systems-level strengths in DLang (low-latency, async I/O, fibers) are adjacent but do not offset the missing C++ depth and industrial-cybersecurity background this position demands.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven high-performance systems work: low-latency services handling millions of requests/sec with async I/O and fibers
Strong engineering-quality mindset: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months in 2014–2015), the core competency of the role
No industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL, or protocol experience (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0)
Recent career trajectory is full-stack web/AI tooling, diverging from embedded/industrial C++ development
